Violets are Red

Roses are Blue

Wait that was wrong

I gotta redo

No. No it won’t. It will not get almost 10 times as many notes as my currently most noted post. I refuse. Also why have I already gotten a reblog that says this?? I currently have 5 notes on this post.

It’s way more than 0.02% cause I’M NOT GETTING 10K, I’ll get a maximum of 100 notes on this post.

Please I’m not ready to be world famous. Please no.

We’re at 300 notes now oh god

Investing at 350ish notes

Gonna be funny when it just suddenly stops gaining notes now and your reblog is one of the last ones

lmao 400 notes now

It’s still just 400, okay? That’s still not even close to 10k. It’s not reaching 10k ever. I’ve had other posts reach over 400 and they still don’t have 10k, so neither will this one.

sure thing buddy keep telling yourself that :3

YEah I will cause it’s true

how is having 600 notes on this going?

I made this post like a day ago at this rate it’s gonna be at 10k in like 20 days. Please no

depends how growth on this post is. if it’s exponential growth, assuming at t = 0 there was 1 note, t = 1 is 1 day, solving 604 ^ t = 10,000 gives us t = 1.438.

10k is coming in less than half a day, if these calculations hold true.

I mean I’d assume if anything it would start to go more slowly the longer time passes and this post is probably competely dying before I reach 10k. At least I hope so…

Some roses are blue,

Some violets are red.

There are too many colors

That ought to be said.

The real world’s complex

So let’s let our love spread.

There are infinite hues

But too few in our head.

I love this lmao

woah that was fast

better blow this up then

You say investing at 700 notes, but it’s almost at 1500, how does that work??

get this to 10k

@non-tyrannical-usa @real-antonio-vivaldi

Please, this stopped gaining traction like 3 days ago, please let it stay that way, I don’t wanna have to wake up with 99+ notifications again, please God no

Hehehehe… welcome to your worst nightmare

If this post doesn’t eventually get over 10k I’m gonna eat my own hat!

You better start chewing cause the post has died out and it’s not even close to 10k :D
